title: Dekays Craftable Items
description: Adds crafting recipes for non craftable items
body:
## Why should you use this datapack?

If finding some things like the enchanted golden apple are to hard for you, you can use this datapack to just craft it. But it does not only add the enchanted golden apple but also a few other things like the saddle, trident and also some blocks like the grass block.
Some recipes are found in "Gallery" the rest of them to find are up to you.
